sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, text_column TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_column) VALUES (1, 'hello world');
UPDATE test_table SET text_column = replace(text_column, 'world', 'duckdb') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, replace(text_column, 'hello', 'hi') AS modified_text FROM test_table;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_column) VALUES (2, 'hello everyone');
